Sweden Charges Syrian-Swedish Man for Attempting to Join ISIS Branch in Somalia

Swedish prosecutors have charged a 23-year-old Swedish-Syrian man with terror offences, accusing him of twice attempting to travel to Somalia in 2023–24 to join Daacish/ISIS
He was intercepted first by Ethiopian authorities near the Somalia border and later by Somali authorities.
He is also accused of financing IS using cryptocurrency and receiving bomb-making instructions.
The trial begins on 3 December at Attunda Court.

War Cusub: Canada oo Sii Kordhisay Hakinta Barnaamijka Group Five ilaa 2027

Dowladda Canada ayaa shaacisay inay saddex sano oo kale u kordhisay hakinta barnaamijka Group Five, kaas oo dad badan — gaar ahaan Soomaalida — ay kaga ambabixi jireen dalka si sharci ah oo nidaamsan.

Barnaamijkan oo hore loo hakiyay 2024-kii, ayaa bulshada la ogeysiiyay in la filayay inuu dib u furmo dhammaadka sanadkan 2025. Balse warkii maanta soo baxay ayaa muujinaya in dib u furitaankaasi dib ugu dhacay ilaa 2027.

Tani waxay saamayn ku yeelatay kumannaan qof oo sugayay jawaab, kuwaas oo horey codsiyadooda ugu gudbiyay waaxda qaxootiga Canada.

Warsame Jirde Warsame, oo ka faallooda arrimaha waqooyiga Ameerika, isla markaana ka tirsan barnaamijyada qaxootiga ardayda, ayaa sharaxay sababaha ugu waaweyn ee hakinta loo kordhiyay iyo waxa ay ka dhigan tahay dadka dalbanaya.

In Finland’s population structure, the number of foreign-language speakers continues to grow significantly, with Somali speakers forming the 6th largest language group at around 27,000 people (Statistics Finland, 2024). What does this mean for domestic textile and fashion companies and the industry's attractiveness? 💭 

“Practically entire groups of people have been excluded from clothing store and fashion brand offerings due to the limited scope of the fashion imagery", says human rights activist and influencer Ujuni Ahmed.

The Finnish Somali diaspora is one of the largest in Finland — yet how much do we truly understand about Somali culture, style and identity? Despite their size and visibility, Somali fashion and the everyday experiences of Somali Finns remain largely absent from mainstream media and fashion discourse.

In the 2020s, however, brands have slowly begun expanding their collections to better reflect the diversity of their audiences — including those who navigate tradition, religion and Western culture in their everyday style choices.

Finland stands with Somalia 🇸🇴 in aspiring towards zero tolerance for FGM. #16DaysofActivism

Fatumo Awil Duale, a 52-year-old cleaner at Burao Hospital and resident of the Mulac camp in Somaliland, is one of the women driving change in her community. Both she and her eldest daughter underwent female genital mutilation (FGM) and continue to suffer severe long-term health consequences. Through awareness-raising and education, Fatumo learned that FGM is not a religious requirement and made the courageous decision not to subject her younger daughter to the practice.

FGM is one of the most serious and widespread forms of gender-based violence in Somalia. With Finland’s 🇫🇮 support, the International Solidarity Foundation and its local partner SOYDAVO work to address the root causes of violence against women and girls, striving to end practices such as FGM, early marriage, and domestic violence.

The determination and leadership Fatumo and other women in her village is essential in achieving zero tolerance for FGM — and in building a more equal and safer future for girls and women in Somalia. Fatumo’s goal is to protect girls from violence and ensure every young woman has the right to make decisions about her own body.

#ACTtoEndViolence #OrangeTheWorld #GenerationEquality #NoExcuse

NordicSom congratulates Finland's new Ambassador to Somalia
Today, Somalia's President Hassan Sheikh Mohamud received the Letters of Credence from Finland's newly appointed Ambassador to Somalia, H.E. Riina-Riikka Heikka.
NordicSom extends warm congratulations to Ambassador Heikka and wishes her every success in this important role. We are optimistic that her tenure will further strengthen the bilateral ties between Finland and Somalia, fostering deeper cooperation and mutual understanding.

We also take this opportunity to express our sincere appreciation to the outgoing Ambassador, H.E. Pirkka Tapiola, for his dedicated service, meaningful engagement with the Somali diaspora community in Finland, and his consistent accessibility throughout his assignment.
We look forward to continued collaboration and dialogue in support of the vibrant connection between the Nordic countries and Somalia.

-------

NordicSom gratulerar Finlands nya ambassadör i Somalia.

Somalias president Hassan Sheikh Mohamud tog idag emot kreditivbrev från Finlands nya ambassadör i Somalia, H.E. Riina-Riikka Heikka.

NordicSom gratulerar ambassadör Heikka och önskar henne lycka till i uppdraget. Vi hoppas att hennes tid kommer att bidra till att stärka relationerna mellan Finland och Somalia.

Vi vill även tacka avgående ambassadör H.E. Pirkka Tapiola för hans engagemang med den somaliska diasporan i Finland och hans tillgänglighet under sin tjänstgöring.

To:
General Asad Osman Abdullahi  
Head of the Somali Police Force  

Amnesty International  
Human Rights Watch  
Somalia Human Rights Commission  

Date:5 December 2025  
Location: London  
-—————————————————

The Permanent Executive Committees of Dooy Shabele State express their strong condemnation and accusations regarding recent events.

Civil society organizations, both within Somalia and in the diaspora, unequivocally denounce the ongoing human rights violations affecting individuals in the region.

Former Southwest State parliamentarian, Nuurta Samow, has been unlawfully detained at Afgooye Police Station for the past week. While others arrested alongside her have been released, she remains in custody without justification, solely for her advocacy of the Dooy Shabele State's formation.

The response from community elders and political leaders to this alarming situation has been woefully inadequate.

Detaining a mother under these circumstances violates the Somali federal constitution and established human rights principles. It is particularly concerning that she has not been formally charged with any offense and is being punished solely for her support of the Dooy Shabele State initiative, which seeks to establish a new administrative region in southern Somalia.

We call for the immediate suspension and removal of the commander of Afgooye Police Station and his officers for their breaches of the police act and the governing principles of law enforcement in Somalia. It is wholly unacceptable to detain a mother and subject her to humiliation, especially in front of her children, who are left traumatized by her arrest.

Nuurta was taken into custody last week when the Afgooye police commander and his officers raided the farm where she and her community were preparing to express their support for the Dooy Shabele State, initially declared two years ago by Digil political factions, civil society organizations, and various community members. This proposed state encompasses the Dooy region of Diinsoor and the Lower Shabelle region.

The residents of Afgooye are enduring severe hardships; they lack a voice, the right to assemble, and the freedom to provide mutual support. They are facing intimidation and arrests similar to those experienced by Nuurta and the elderly individuals detained alongside her at gunpoint by the Afgooye police force.

Reliable reports from Somali civil society organizations indicate that the orders to detain supporters of the Dooy Shabele State originated from Baydhabo, under the command of Laftagareen.

We urgently demand the immediate release of Nuurta and all other detained supporters without further delay.

Dooy Shabele State Permanent Executive Committees

In Sirdoonka Qaranka la kala daadiyaa ma ahayn hawl fudud oo iska dhacday. Waxa ay ahayd ku tala-gal si loo gaadho laba arimood. Waa ta koowaade, in aan la ogaan oo la xannibin dadka soo galaya Somaliland oo ay xogtooda hayeen sirdoonku. Iyo ta labaad oo ah, in la tirtiro wixii xog ah ee laga hayo dadkii waligoodba Somaliland cadawga ku ahaa kuwaas oo ay ka mid ahaayeen Ictisaam iyo wadaaddo ay hoggaamiso, madaxda, ciidamada iyo sirdoonka dawladda Soomaaliya, sirdoonada wadamada aynu jaarka nahay iyo dad badan oo magaca soomaali wata oo waligood Somaliland cadaw ku ahaa.

3. Soo galitaanka dadka durbaanka u tumayay burburinta Somaliland:
Markii laga kala daadiyey sirdoonkii dalka, waxa wadanka soo galay dad badan oo ciidamo ah iyo siyaasiyiin hor booda duminta Somaliland. Dadkaasi waxa ay sanadkaaba ka wadeen dalka abaabul in mar uu Awdal qalalaase ka dhaco si ay Awdal u noqoto meeshii labaad ee Somaliland ah ee ku dhawaaqda in ay ka noqdeen Somalilandnimadii. Dadkaasi waxa ay soo galiyeen wadanka lacag, hub iyo wax kasta oo ay ku fushan karaan qorshayaashooda.
Ciidamadaa soo galay wadanka waxa ka mid ahaa ciidamo hadda u shaqeeya maamulka Muqdisho, kuwaas oo inta ay ka soo degeen Madaarka Hargeysa, qaarna wadanka sii dhaafeen qaarna inta ay wixii ay doonayeen qabsadeen iska noqday.

4. Magacaabistii Badhasaabka Gobolka Salal:
Ma kala garan karo in dawladdu marka horeba waxa ay doonaysay in qalalaase ka dhaco gobolka Salal iyo in amarkii ka soo baxay jabuuti la qaatay. Waxayse u badan tahay ta dambe. Waxaad ka garan kartaa in Cirro u magacaabo badhasaab ka soo jeeda labada beelood ee wada dega gobolka Salal mid ka ah badhasaabka gobolka. Tani judhiiba waxa ay keentay shaki ka yimi beesha kale. Waxaana xusid mudan sidii uu uga qayb qaatay badhasaabka gobolku dhibta dhacday, in ay ahayd qorshe hore loo degay oo Cirrana fulieyay.

5. Buugga Xeer Ciise:
Dhibta buugga Xeer Ciise waxa uu ka dhashay go’aan qaadasho la’aan baahsan oo ay ku ceebaysan tahay dawladda Cirro. Laakiin buuggan waxa hawshiisa waday dawladda Jabuuti oo ka mid ah mulkiilayaasha Xukuumadda Waddani. Sida uu sheegay Ugaaska beesha Ciise, dhexdhexaadinta in bandhigga buuga lagu qabto magaalada Saylac, waxa qayb ka ahaa Madaxweynaha Jabuuti oo ku qanciyey Cirro in xafladda lagu qabto Saylac, Cirrana aqbalay. Markaa ogaada xeerkanba amar buu ahaa madaxa laynagaga keenay.

6. Dhacdadii ka dhacday Borama:
Dhacdooyinka ka dhacay magaalada Borama waxa ka wada qayb qaatay laba qolo. Qolada koowaad waxa ay ahaayeen dad Somaliland ah oo aaminsan Somalilandnimadooda, laakiin ka biyo diiday in Buuggaa Xeer Ciise la keeno Saylac. Qolada kale waxa ay ahayd, qolo ilaa maalintii Cirro loo dhiibay talada dalka ku soo gurmayay magaalada Borama iyo guud ahaan Gobolka Awdal, kuwaas oo qorshaynayay in ay mar uun arki doonaan dhibaato iyo amni darro ka dhacda Gobolka Awal, iyaguna ay hawshooda fushan doonaan. Qoladaasi waxa ay isugu jirtaa laba qolo oo kala ah qolo qurba joog ah oo u ololaysa Awdal State iyo qolo laga soo diray Muqdisho oo fulinaysay amarada dawladda Muqdisho si loo maleego dhagaro ka dhan ah Somaliland.

7. Joojintii Buugga Xeer Ciise ka dib
Markii la joojiyey soo bandhigistii: Xeer Ciise, dad badan oo dawladda la dhacsan waxa ay ku doodayaan in magaalada Borama ay ka dagaalameen ciidamo kale oo ka yimi dalalka jaarka kuwaas oo dhib u geystay dadka shacabka ah si loogu eedeeyo in ciidamada dawladdu ay iyagu geysteen. Haddiiba ay sidaasi jirto, anigu in fashil lagu qarinayo ayaan aaminsanahaye, dawladdu sow maaha cidda u soo deysay in ay soo galaan magaalada Borama iyo guud ahaan Gobolka Awdal? Sow dawladda maaha cidda kala daadisay sirdoonkii qaranka ee lumisay xogtii ay hayeen ciidamadii sirdoonka ee la dareeriyay? Sow dawadda maaha cidda fadhiidka noqotay ee ku fashilantay ilaalinta xuduudaheeda? Dawladda sow maaha cidda dareeerisay ciidamadeedii kuna badashay qaar Soomaaliya ay Erateriya ku soo tababartay? Waxaas oo dhan yaa ka masuul ah? Ma cid aan dawladda ahayn baa loo haystaa oo uu kaw ka yahay Madaxweyne Cirro?

8. Maxaa Xiga?
Ugaaska Beesha Ciise oo hadlay waxa uu sheegay in qofkasta oo Ciise ahi uu dhaqaaqo isla markaana difaacdo sharaftiisa iyo dhulkiisa. Tani waa in uu ku dhawaaqay dagaal. Hadda ma odhan xafaldda Buugga Xeer Ciise qabsada, laakiin baddalkeeda wuxuu ku booriyay dadkiisa in ay dagaalamaan. Hadii markaa ay sidaa ku sii socoto, waxa dhici karta iska hor imaad beelaysan oo labada beelood ee walaalaha ah ku dhex mara galbeedka Somaliland. Waxaase dhici karta in Madaxweynaha Jabuuti uu joojoyo dagaalkaa Ugaaskiisu ku dhawaaqay, sababtuna ay tahay laba arimood:
• In uu doorasho galayo oo aanu u baahnayn qas iyo qalalaase,
• In uu ka cabsi qabo hadii ciidamo reerkiisa ahi hub helaan ay kula soo noqon karaan isaga oo meesha ka tuuri karaan.
Laakiin waxaanan hubin go’aanka ay qaadan doonto dawladdu haddii iska hor imaad dhaco, waxaase dhici karta in ay tidhaa labadiinuba gar lihidin.

9. Yaa leh eedda gabood-falkii Awdal:
Dad badan oo qabyaaladi haysaa waxa ay doonayaan in ay eedda ka leeexiyaan Madaxweyne Cirro oo ay saaraan Wasiirka iscasilay ama Taliyaha Ciidanka Booliska ama Taliyaha Ciidanka Qaranka. Laakiin eedda oo dhan waxa leh Madaxweyne Cirro oo go'aankiisa jilacsan uu sababay wixii dhacay meelna loo dhaafin maayo.

💼 To mark International Human Rights Day, our Embassy hosted a working breakfast focused on the rights of people of Somali origin in Finland. Representatives from the Finland-Somalia Association, Finnish Somali League, Finnish Somalia Network, and AFAES, along with officials from the the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Finland and the Ministry of Economic Affairs and Employment of Finland, gathered to address key challenges facing the Somali community in Finland. 🇫🇮

The discussion centered around critical topics such as employment, integration strategies, and creating better opportunities for the younger generation. The conversation reinforced the need for inclusive policies that support the full participation of minorities in Finland’s social, economic, and political life. 🤝

Last night, London’s iconic savoy hotel glittered under the weight of Somali excellence. Over 200 of our community’s brightest stars gathered for the prestigious International Somali Awards, hosted by Anti Tribalism Movement in a breathtaking black-tie gala dinner. The air was electric with pride, ambition, and shared triumph. The brilliant Barrister Hashi Mohamed set the scene with a powerful and eloquent keynote speech, reminding us of our strength.  Then, the awards flowed each one a testament to dazzling talent and relentless success. A historic moment as International Boxing Champion Ramla Ali was honoured, presented by the inspirational Mayor of St. Louis Park, Nadia Mohamed. A symbol of power, grace, and breaking boundaries. The room fell into profound reverence as a Lifetime Achievement Award was bestowed upon the legendary musician and iconic voice, Maryan Mursal Isse. The honour was presented by a giant of Somali storytelling, Veteran BBC Somali Service Journalist Abdulahi Haji, whose own 50+ year career mirrors a life dedicated to our narrative. From the pioneers to the rising stars, every winner and runner-up showcased the magnificent tapestry of Somali success. This was more than an awards ceremony. This was a declaration. A family reunion of giants. A showcase of what happens when talent meets tenacity. This is what it means to be Somali. Our light is too bright to be contained. Among other stars the Lord Mayor of Sheffield Cllr Safiya Saeed Berberaawii and our international writer Nuradin Farah were present; proudly we are Somalis; best of nations. Warbixin | Xiisadda Sool & Sanaag iyo Saameynta Qurba-joogta

Warbixin ay BBC Somali baahisay ayaa ka dhalatay muuqaallo si weyn ugu faafay baraha bulshada, kuwaas oo muujinaya rag qurba-joog ah oo ka yimid UK, kuwaas oo ku biiray jiidaha hore ee dagaalka ka socda deegaannada Sool iyo Sanaag. Muuqaallada waxaa lagu arkay rag lagu kala magacaabo Guuleed iyo Iheqwe, iyagoo dhiirigelinaya ciidamada hubeysan, una ballan-qaadaya inay qayb ka yihiin halganka ka dhanka ah ciidamada Somaliland.

Faallooyinka iyo xogaha lagu baahiyay Facebook ayaa tilmaamaya in raggan lala xiriirinayo beesha Warsangali, isla markaana xiisaddu ay si gaar ah uga soo ifbaxday agagaarka Ceerigaabo iyo guud ahaan gobolka Sanaag. Tani waxay muujinaysaa in colaadda aysan ku koobnayn Laascaanood oo kaliya, balse ay ku fiday deegaanno kale oo ballaaran.

Ka-qaybgalka qurba-joogta ayaa abuuray dood xooggan; qaar waxay u arkaan taageero iyo garab-istaag bulsho, halka kuwo kalena ay ku doodayaan in faragelinta noocan ahi ay sii hurinayso colaadda oo caqabad ku noqon karto xal nabadeed.

Guud ahaan, xiisadda Sool iyo Sanaag waa arrin leh asal qoto dheer oo la xiriira maamul, amni iyo matalaad bulsho. Xalka waara wuxuu u baahan yahay wada-hadal loo dhan yahay, ka-fogaansho kicin, iyo in la xoojiyo dadaallada nabadeed ee bulshada iyo hoggaamiyeyaasha deegaanka.

Hooyadan maalmo kahor ayay duubtay muuqal jujuub ah, oo Dukaan Caannaha ku Hargeysa ka dalbanayo raali-galin. Waxaa garab taagna Abtigeed,Odaygeeda iyo kuwii la dhashay. Qofkastoo daawaday wuu ka xumaaday. Waana la arkayay in hadalku kasoo bixi la'yahay oo lasoo qasbay.

Maalinti xigtaa hadana la xidhay. Ninkeeda ayaa sheegay inuu ergo galay oo Dukaankii u tagay. Wuxuuna Dukaankii dalbaday in ay raali-galin bixiso. Waxay qoyskan sheegen in hooyadu macaan lahayd kuna qasbanayd in ay raali-galin xoog ah bixiso. Bayaan ay soo saartay, Midowga Yurub wuxuu yiri:
“Ixtiraamidda midnimada, madaxbannaanida iyo dhulka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya… waa furaha nabadda iyo xasilloonida guud ahaan Geeska Afrika.”

Dowladda Soomaaliya ayaa si adag u diidday go’aanka Israa’iil, iyadoo ku tilmaantay weerar toos ah oo lagu qaaday madaxbannaanida dalka. Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya, Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud, ayaa ku eedeeyay Israa’iil inay ku xadgudubtay xeerarka caalamiga ah.
Dhowr dal iyo ururro goboleed ayaa sidoo kale cambaareeyay aqoonsiga ay Israa’iil siisay Somaliland.

Masar, Turkiga, Jabuuti iyo Golaha Iskaashiga Khaliijka (GCC) ayaa ka digay in arrintani ay carqaladeyn karto xasilloonida Geeska Afrika iyo gobolka Badda Cas. Midowga Afrika iyo ururka IGAD ayaa sheegay in xuduudaha caalamka laga aqoonsan yahay ee Soomaaliya aan si hal dhinac ah loo beddeli karin.

Nayjeeriya, dalal badan oo Bariga Dhexe ah, iyo Ururka Iskaashiga Islaamka (OIC) ayaa ku boorriyay waddamada caalamka inaysan aqoonsan gobollo gooni-u-goosad ah. Mareykanka ayaa sheegay inuu weli aqoonsan yahay midnimada iyo dhulka Soomaaliya, oo ay ku jirto Somaliland.

Israa’iil ayaa sheegtay in aqoonsigan uu qeyb ka yahay ballaarinta iskaashigeeda caalamiga ah ee la xiriira Heshiisyada Abraham, kuwaas oo intooda badan la saxiixay xilligii madaxweynihii hore ee Mareykanka Donald Trump. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, inkastoo Trump uu mar kale ku soo laabtay Aqalka Cad, ma jiro dal Carbeed oo cusub oo ku biiray heshiisyada, sababo la xiriira dagaalka ka socda Qasa.

Somaliland, oo tan iyo 1991 u shaqaynaysay sidii dal iskii isu maamula (de facto) una leh hay’ado u gaar ah, lacag iyo ciidan amni, ayaa rajaynaysa in aqoonsiga Israa’iil uu jebin doono go’doonkii diblomaasiyadeed ee muddada dheer jiray, isla markaana ku dhiirrigelin doono dalal kale inay ku daydaan.

Lacag dirista xawaaladaha Maraykanka oo canshuur lagu soo rogay.! 

Laga bilaabo 1-da Janaayo ee sanadkaan cusub ee milaadiga 2026, canshuur cusub oo federaal ah oo Maraykanka ah ayaa lagu soo rogay xawaaladaha lacago caalami ah ee laga soo diro gudaha Mareykanka.
Isbeddelkan waxa uu ku saleysan yahay sharciga Mareykanka, wuxuuna khuseeyaa dhammaan shirkadaha xawaaladaha ee shatiga haysta, oo ay ku jirto AMAL USA INC.

Waa maxay Canshuurta Xawaaladda (Remittance Tax)?
• Heerka canshuurta: 1%
• Waxay khusayso: Xawaaladaha caalamiga ah ee u qalma
• Waxaa dejisay: Dowladda Federaalka Mareykanka
• Waxaa ururiya: Shirkadaha xawaaladaha (sida sharcigu farayo)
• Fiiro gaar ah: Canshuurtani way ka duwan tahay khidmada adeegga.

Sidee loo Xisaabiyaa Canshuurta?

Canshuurta xawaaladdu waa 1% lacagta aad direyso, mana ku jirto khidmada adeegga.

Tusaale:
• Lacagta la dirayo: $100.00
• Khidmada xawaaladda: $5.00
• Canshuurta xawaaladda (1%): $1.00
• Wadarta aad bixinayso: $106.00

Ma ku Qori Doontaa Rasiidka?

Haa. Rasiidkaagu wuxuu si cad u muujin doonaa:
lacagta la diray, khidmada xawaaladda, canshuurta xawaaladda (haddii ay khusayso), iyo wadarta la bixiyay. Ma jiraan kharashaad qarsoon.

Ma Jiraa Ka-Dhaaf (Exemptions)?

Qaar ka mid ah xawaaladaha ayaa laga yaabaa inay u qalmaan ka-dhaaf, iyadoo ku xiran habka lacag-bixinta, nooca macaamilka, ama shuruudo kale oo sharci ah.
Haddii laga dhaafo, canshuur xawaalad laguma dalaci doono, waxaana taas lagu muujin doonaa rasiidkaaga.

Maxaa Sababay Arrintan?

Tani waa waajib sharci federaal ah, mana aha siyaasad shirkadeed.
Dhammaan shirkadaha xawaaladaha ee Mareykanka waa inay u hoggaansamaan.

Dhaqdhaqaaqa uu ku leeyahay Dalalka Suudaan, Liibiya iyo kuwo kale oo Carbeed ayaa hoos loo dhigay si aanay markale loo eryin Dalkaan oo sanadihii u danbeeyay ciidamo, Hub iyo lacag xad-dhaaf ah ku gurayay dalal dhowr ah.
Wararka soo baxaya ayaa sheegaya in arrintaas ay xitaa abuurtay khilaaf gudaha Xubnaha isutagay ee ku midoobay Magaca Imaaraatka Carabta, waxa ay qaarkood ka caroodeen sababta loo helay sira qarsoon ee muddo ku dhaqaale beelayeen.
Imaaraatka ayaa tuke cambaar leh ka noqday Waddamada Carabta, waxa uu dib u garanayaa agabkii iyo qorshihiisa fashilmay ee uu doonayay in kala qaybiyo dalalka rabshadaha ka socdaan isaga oo isaga dhigaya in uu abaal u galayo.
Imaaraatka waxaa loo arkaa in uu bar kulan u yahay Israa’iil iyo xubnaha ay doonayso in ay ka goyso Dalalkooda, safarrada qarsoon ee xubnahaas ayaa kordhay muddooyinkii danbe inkasta oo haatan uu jiro baraarug sababay in indhaha lagu hayo dhaqdhaqaaqyada Imaaraatka.

As we reflect on 2025, we've been looking back with gratitude and pride on some of our favourite memories from the year - and some of our favourite pictures that remind us of so many special moments!

🌟 2025 UK highlights:

● Launch event in February 2025 at East London Mosque and London Muslim Centre
● Ramadan 2025 Live Appeal from London and Mogadishu on Universal Somali TV
● Our first Qurbani fundraising campaign
● Playing our part in vibrant Somali Week events and activities in London, Leicester and Bristol with KAYD, Somali Development Services and Bristol Somali Forum
● #BlackHistoryMonth webinars in partnership with The Muslim Council of Britain
● Supporting the Winter Access Event for would-be university entrants organised by Cambridge and UCL Somali Societies
● Joining 50 organisations worldwide as members of the Every Pregnancy  coalition
● Our successful Hike for Hooyo fundraiser for Somali mothers and babies in partnership with Somali Hikers.

🌟 2025 Somalia highlights in partnership with Zamzam Foundation:

● Delivered clean, safe water to communities facing severe drought
● Supported mothers and children with essential healthcare and nutrition
● Helped children access education and safe learning spaces
● Provided emergency food aid and shelter to families affected by conflict and displacement
● Strengthened farming families and women/young people in urban areas through sustainable livelihood projects
● Shared powerful stories that raised awareness of Somalia's needs and its people's huge potential.

Our sincere thanks to everyone who donated, shared our work, joined a fundraiser, volunteered, or simply spread the word.

𝗠𝘂𝘅𝘂𝘂 𝘆𝗮𝗵𝗮𝘆 𝗔𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗺 𝗔𝗰𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗱𝘀?

Waa heshiisyo uu garwadeen ka yahay Maraykanku oo u dhexeeya dowladda Israa’iil iyo dowladaha Carbeed, ujeedkiisuna yahay caadiyaynta xiriirka u dhexeeyay waddamada Carabta iyo Israa'iil.

Imraatka Carabt iyo Baxrayn ayaa markii ugu horreysay heshiiskaas la saxiixday Israa’iil bishii Sibteember 2020, Morooko ayaa Iyana Diseember 2020 saxiixday heshiiskaas. Sudaan ayaa Jannaayo 2021 saxiixday qeyb ka mid ah heshiiskaas, inkastoo aan la dhammaystirin dhibaatooyinka ka jira Suudaan darteed.

2025, waddanka Kasakhistaan ayaa ku dhowaaqday in ay doonayso in ay qayb ka noqoto heshiiska Abraham Accords.

𝗠𝘂𝘅𝘂𝘂 𝘀𝗮𝗹𝗸𝗮 𝗸𝘂 𝗵𝗮𝘆𝗮𝗮 𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗶𝘀𝗸𝗮 𝗔𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗺𝗮 𝗔𝗰𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗱𝘀?
Xoghayihii hore arrimaha dibadda Maraykanka, John Kerry oo 2016 loo diray in uu ambaqaado heshiisyada nabadda Bariga Dhexe, ayaa ka soo noqoshadiisii Bariga Dhexe jeediyay hadal saamayn badan yeeshay oo uu ku bilaabay “No, no, no” oo uu uga jeeday in aanay suurtagal ahayn heshiisyo nabadeed oo dhexmara Israa’iil iyo waddamada Carabta, iyadoo aan xalka qayba laga dhigin in Falastiin iyo Israa’iil ay noqdaan laba dal (two state solution).

Hadalkaas oo maamulka Israa’iil iyo siyaasiyiinta Maraykanka ah ee taageera ay diidmo ka keeneen, ayay olole u galeen in la keeno xal kale oo heshiisyo nabadeed oo ka madax-bannaan qadiyadda Falastiin lagu gaari karo.

Sannadkii 2020 xilligii hore ee madaxweyne Trump ayaa fikradda Abraham Accords waxaa soo jeediyay Imaaraatka Carabta, sida uu buuggiisa “Let My People Know” the inside story of the Abraham Accords and what lies ahead, uu ku qoray madaxa machadka nabadda ee Abaraham Accords, ahna la-taliye hore safaaradda Maraykanka ee Israa’iil, Aryeh Lightstone.

Natanyaahu iyo Trump ayaa la qaatay Imaaraatka aragtidaas, iyagoo u arkay xal lagu keeni karo heshiisyo nabadeed oo dhexmara Carabta iyo Yahuudda oo aanay qayb ka ahayn qadiyaadda Falastiin.
Madaxweyne Trump oo ballanqaadyo amni iyo iskaashi u sameeyay waddamada heshiiskaas saxiixa, ayaa la siiyay dhexdhexaadinta iyo ka odayaynta heshiisyada.

𝗠𝗮𝘅𝗮𝘆 𝘆𝗶𝗵𝗶𝗶𝗻 𝘂𝗷𝗲𝗲𝗱𝗼𝗼𝘆𝗶𝗻𝗸𝗮 𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗯𝘁𝗮 𝗮𝗵 𝗲𝗲 𝗔𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗺 𝗔𝗰𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗱𝘀, 𝘆𝗮𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝗳𝗮𝗮’𝗶𝗶𝗱𝗼 𝗸𝘂 𝗾𝗮𝗯𝗮?
Qaraarkii qaramada midoobey 1947, ee dhulka Falastiin lagu qeybiyay, Israa’iilna loogu aqoonsaday dowlad, waxaa si qayaxan uga horyimid dowladaha Carbeed iyo kuwa gobolka. Diidmada jritaanka waddan Israa’iil la yiraahdo ee waddamada Carabta, waxa ay caqabad ku ahayd Israa’iil iyo danaha Maraykanka ee gobolka, iyadoo sii kordhisay nacaybka iyo cadaadiska ay la kulmayeen dadka ku abtirsada Yuhuudda.

Si taas meesha looga saaro ayaa xoog badan la geliyay ambaqaadka Abraham Accords oo ujeedooyinkiisa laga dhigay:
🔹Caadiyaynta xiriirka waddamada Carabta iyo Israa’iil.
🔹Nabad ku wada noolashaha diimaha Ibraahiimiyada (Kiristanka, Yuhuudda iyo Islaamka), waa sida ay u dhigeene.
🔹Kor u qaadidda iskaashiga dhaqaalaha gobolka.
🔹Iskaashi amni iyo nabadaynta gobolka Bariga Dhexe.

Faa’iidada ugu badan ee heshiiska waxa ku qaba Israa’iil oo helaysa aqoonsi jiritaankeeda ah oo aan ku xirnayn qaddiyadda Carabta ee arrinta Falastiin iyo Maraykanka oo dantiisa gobolka ka dhex arka wadajirka Carabta iyo Israa’iil. 
Waddamada saxiisa heshiiskaan ayaa iyana helaya faa'iidada iskaashiga dhaqaale ee Israa'iil iyo taageerada Maraykanka.

𝗠𝗮𝘅𝗮𝗮 𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗶𝘀𝘆𝗮𝗱𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝗹𝗼𝗼𝗴𝘂 𝗯𝗶𝘅𝗶𝘆𝗮𝘆 𝗔𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗵𝗮𝗺 𝗔𝗰𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗱𝘀?
Heshiisyadani waa kuwo siyaasadeed wax sal ahna kuma laha diimaha.
Magaca Abraham (Nebi Ibraahiim Cs), waxaa loo siiyay heshiisyadaan in loo geliyo shaati diimeed, si dadka loogu qanciyo nabad kuwada noolaanshaha diimaha kala duwan ee gobolka.
Nebi Ibraahim oo dhalay Nebi Ismaaciil Cs, oo uu ku abtirsado Nebi Muxamed Scw, iyo Nabi Isxaaq Cs oo dhalay Nebi Yacquub Cs oo ah aabbaha ay ku abtirsadaan Yuhuuddu, islamarkaana ahna awoowaha uu ku abtirsado Nebi Ciise Cs, ayaa laga keenay walaalaynta diimaha Islaamka, kiristanka iyo Yuhuudda, sidaasaana heshiiska loogu magac daray Nebi Ibraahim Cs.

Si iskaashiga diimaha iyo nabad kuwada noolaanshahooda loo dhabeeyo, waxaa Imaaradda Abu Dhabi ee Imaaraatka Carabta laga dhisay masjidka Imam Al-Teyib Mosque, oo ah xarun ay kuwada yaallaan masjid, kaniisad Yuhuud ah iyo mid Kiristan ah oo loogu talagalay wadajirka diimaha Ibraahiimiyada.

Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda Mareykanka, ayaa Arbacadii ku dhawaaqday, inay hakisay dhammaan gargaarkii Mareykanka ee la siin jiray dowladda Soomaaliya, iyadoo sababta ay ku sheegtay dhacdo la sheegay oo ah in saraakiil ka tirsan dalka ay burburiyeen bakhaar ay lahayd Hay'adda Cuntada Adduunka (WFP) isla markaana ay kala baxeen 76 metric tan oo gargaar cunto ah oo loogu talagalay shacabka Soomaaliyeed ee nugul.

"Maamulka Trump uma dulqaadan doono dayacaad, xatooyo, iyo leexinta gargaarka," ayay wasaaraddu ku tiri qoraal ay ku daabacday barta X.

Mareykanka ayaa sanadkii hore ku deeqay in ka badan 2 bilyan oo doolar Hay’adda Cuntada Addunka (WFP), oo ah hay'adda hormuudka u ah gargaarka bini'aadanimada adduunka, isaga oo gargaar cunto oo degdeg ah siiya malaayiin dad ah oo ay saameeyeen dhibaatooyin kala duwan, sida gaajo, colaad ama musiibooyin dabiici ah.

WFP ayaa bishii Oktoobar ee la soo dhaafay ka digtay dhibaato gaajo oo sii xumaanaysa, taas oo qayb ahaan ay sabab u tahay joojinta maalgelinta oo keentay in tiro yar oo Soomaali ah ay helaan gargaar iyo heerarka xaaladaha nafaqo-darada oo kordhay.

Soomaaliya, weli lama oga gargaarka kale ee ay arrintan saameyn ku yeelan karto ama muddada ay qaadan doonto.

Capitol Hill ayaa la xiriiray Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda, sii uu  helo macluumaad dheeraad ah.

"Dib u bilaabidda bixinta gargaar kasta waxay ku xirnaan doontaa Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya oo qaadata mas'uuliyadda falalkeeda ee aan la aqbali Karin, isla markaana qaada tallaabooyin wax ku ool ah," ayay wasaaraddu ku tiri bayaan ay soo saartay.

Go'aanka maamulka Trump ayaa imaanaya iyadoo ay sii korhayaan weerarada ka dhanka ah soogaalootiga sharci darrada ah ee Soomaalida ah eek u nool Mareykanka.

Trump wuxuu soo hakiyay sharciga ku meel gaarka ah ee loogu talagalay dadka Soomaalida ah ee deggan Minnesota dabayaaqadii bishii November, isaga oo sheegay in gobolku uu noqday "xarunta lacagaha been abuurka ah".

Wasiirka arrimaha dibadda Iiraan, Cabbaas Ciraaqji oo maanta shir jaraa’id la qabtay dhiggiisa dalka Cumaan, ayaa warbaahinta u sheegay ; “Waxaan taageersanahay midnimada Yemen, waxaanan taageeraynaa mashruuc kasta oo u adeegaya himiladaas. Sidoo kale, waxaan taageersanahay midnimada Suuriya iyo Soomaaliya.”

Jabbuuti, dhawrkii cisho ee u danbeeyay waxa tabta Iiraan ka taagnaa kacdoon la cadaadinayo. Maanta waxa dhintay yarkii badhtanka Jabbuuti isku gubay darraad nololxumada awgeed. Tan oo sii labajibbaartay kacdoonka iyo mudaharraadada gudaha Jabbuuti ee la cabudhinayo xogahooda. Jeelasha Jabbuuti way buuxsameen, misna kacdoonku wuu sii labaqarxay. Waa halkii uu ka bilaabmay "Kacdoonkii Gu'ga Carabtu"

Xaaladda Yemeni faraha ayay ka baxday. Maraakiibta Tamarta dunida u badan ayaa mara gacanka Cadan ama gacanka Berbera. Waa sababta haddii Yemen la waayay ay muhiim noqotay Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland. 

Wasiirka Khaarajiga ee Turkidu, Hakan Fidan arrintaas ayuu ka dhawaajiyay. Sababtuna waa in uu moodayay "Somaliland oo maanta maamusha marinbiyoodka ugu mudan gobolka xasaasiga ah ee Bariga Dhexe oo dhami, ayna Muqdishada guuldarraysatay u hoostagin" oo waxay Turkidu xisaabsadeen "In Berbera ay Xamar hoostagto" waxayna rabeen "in qolyaha Hawiye ay wax walba ka sexeexdaan sida khayraadka badda, berriga, kastamada muhiimka ah, shidaalka, iwm" sidaana ay u maamulaan marinbiyoodka muhiimka ah ee gacanka Berbera. 

Iiraan, waxa dhawr cisho oo xidhiidha ka socda kacdoon lagaga cabbanayo nidaamka meeshaas ka jira ee xalin kari waayay sicirbararka xadkabaxa ah ee maciishada nolosha rayidka adkeeyay. 

Turkigu, sannadka 2027 ama 2028 doorashada ku soo wajahan, waxa xaalad qallafsan oo aan la saadaalin karin ka dhigaya dhawr umuurood:

Kow, Xisbiga Bakteeriyada Muslimiintu, Erdugan uu hoggaamiyo, oo doonaya in uu soo laabto.

Laba, musuq xadkabaxa iyo sicirbarar ay lacagta Turkidu qiimidhacday oo nolosha muwaadiniinta diiqad iyo adayg ka dhigtay.

Saddex, xisbiga Jamhuuriga ee uu hoggaanka u hayay maayarkii Kamaal ee la xidhay oo aad uga xooggan oo boqolkiiba afar iyo konton ka badan haysta sida ay xuseen daraasadihii u danbeeyay oo aan wax dulqaada u muujin doonin bakteeriyada Muslinka iyo raciyadiisa.

Afar, marka doorashadu soo dhadhawaato oo dawlado badan oo ku kacsani ay kala bixi doonaan lacagaha adag ee ganacsatooda ka taalla, taas oo cidhiidhiga iyo adayga nolosha cirka sii geyn doonta.

Maraykan, wuxu ka dhabbeeyay hanjabaadiisii ahayd "haddii haayadaha caalamiga ahi ay u shaqayn waayeen si dhexdhexaada, in uu joojin doono miisaaniyadda adag ee uu ku kaabo" wuxuna toos u joojiyay maaliyaddii uu siin jiray 66 haayadood oo caalami ah oo ay ka mid tahay haayadda Midowga Qaramada Afrika, AU. Taas oo sida aynu wada ognahay uu hoggaamiyo shakhsi u nugul oo uu keensaday Shiinuhu. Waa wasiirkii hore ee khaarajiga Jabbuuti, Maxamuud Yuusuf. 

Soomaaliya, xulashadii yarayd ee labada boqol ee qof ee u badnaa tagsiilayaasha Yurub iyo Maraykan ay iskaga dhex xulan jireen "mid ka mida oo hoggaamiya ama madaxweyne lagu sheego" waxay ka doorbideen in uu nin waliba tuuladiisa haysto, iyada oo reerka Hawiye ay u arkayeen "in hanti Hawiye leeyahay laga cunayo" 

Beddelkeeda, waxay ku heshiiyeen in beesha Hawiye ay boobaan wax kasta oo manfac ah oo magac "Soomaali" wada leedahay lagaga helo gaal iyo muslin, madow iyo caddaan, jin iyo insi, dad iyo dugaag. Ajandaha caynkaasa waxa ay ula baxeen Xasan Sheekh, Fiqi Xuubcaaro, Abokor Baalle, Cali Wajiis mise Wiski, Bashiir Salaadka dhabanada kuuskuusan iyo Cali Balcad oo ilmaadeeri "Soomaalinimo iyo Islaanimo" 

Waxani in ay akhlaaqxumo iyo iimaan la'aan bilaa xishooda ay yihiin, ciddii xusuusi is tidhaa nimankaas isku beesha ah, waxay ku sheegaan "in Islaanimada iyo Soomaalinimada laga doortay Yuhuud iyo gaalo" tan oo caddaynaysa "in aynaan isku dhaqan ahayn umaddan" taasna uu Xasan Sheekh xalay inoo markhaati furay markii uu qiray intii aanu ugu taagwaynay soddonka sannadood iyo saaidka ee ahayd "Soomaali diin ayuunbaa ka dhexeysa" wax kala kama dhexeeyo.

Mustaqbalka Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland, waa mid aad u wanaagsan. Soomaaliyana, mustaqbalkeeda cidi garan mayso. Xasan Sheekh ayaaba sheegay in uu gelinba qof yahay. Dalka uu qofka caynkaasi maamulanaa, rajo iyo aayatiin ma laha.

Maxamed Bin Salmaan, yarkii dhaxalsugaha Sucuudiga ahaa oo baryahan isbiday in uu Somaliland u hanjabi karo. Waxay xalay Israaiil xusuusisay "in aanu keligii dhaxalsuge ahayn" tabtii Suldaan Xasanka Habar Awal ayay baabuur kale ka garab rakaabiyeen. Dib looma maqal. 

Gadar, waxa hadal ugu danbaysay maalintii uu wasiirka qurbajoogga Israaiil ku yidhi "magaalo yar oo qoys leeyihiin oo kaganacsiga kulanada argagixisada iyo ururrada danbiyada caalamiga ah ka shaqeeya ayaad tihiin ee dal ma tihidin" dhawaan markii ay duqeeyaan diyaaradaha Israaiilna, badheedh uu Maraykan la ogaa Israaiil ayay ahayd. Macnaheeduna, waa in ayna Gadar muhiim u ahayn Maraykan oo ku leh saldhigga ugu weyn ee Bariga Dhexe.

Haayadda xasaradaha dunidu, ICG. Waxay warbixinteedii u danbaysay ku sheegtay suuragalnimada dagaalka Eriteria iyo Itoobiya. Kaas oo gobolka saamayn xooggan ku yeelan doona. Tan oo qudheedu muhiim ka sii dhigaysa Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland.

Marka lagu daro, xaaladda Yurub, Ukraine, gantaaladii uu Ruushku xalay adeegsaday, hadalkii saaka ay tidhi Raysalwasaaraha Talyaanigu ee ahaa "maxaynu reer Yurubow Maraykan ka dabasoconnaa ee aynu Moscow isugu dhiibi la'nahay" iyo dhoolatuska militari ee ay dalalka ku midoobay BRICS ku samaynayaan dalka Koonfur Afrika ee ay halkudhegga uga dhigeen "dunida quwad qudhi kama jiri karto" oo Iiraana ay qayb laxaad leh ka tahay. 

Tan qudheeda ayaa Jamhuuriyadda Somalilans ka sii dhigaysa. Wax kasta oo amniga badeecadaha adduunka ee ganacsiga taabanayaa, waxay Jamhuuriyadda Barakaysan sii siinaysaa ahmiyad gaara. Guud ahaan dunida iyo gobolkaba, waxa ka muuqda tuducyo uu Hadraawi lahaa:

"Warshad suufiyaa daaran
Waxay soo siddaa geeri"

.....
Sawirku waa kacdoonka Iiraan ka socday baryahan.

SELEKSI CALON TENAGA KONTRAK KERJA INDIVIDU (KKI) YANG DIANGGAP MAMPU PADA SATUAN PENDIDIKAN NEGERI DI LINGKUNGAN DINAS PENDIDIKAN PROVINSI DKI JAKARTA TAHUN ANGGARAN 2026

2. PERSYARATAN KHUSUS

a. PERSYARATAN KHUSUS PENDIDIK

1) Pendidikan Anak Usia Dini (PAUD)

Pendidikan paling rendah Diploma Empat (D-IV) atau Sarjana (S1) dalam bidang Pendidikan Anak Usia Dini, bimbingan konseling atau psikologi;

2) Sekolah Luar Biasa (SLB)

a) Pendidik Mata Pelajaran Pendidikan Khusus/Guru Kelas.

Pendidikan paling rendah lulusan S1-PLB (Pendidikan Luar Biasa).

b) Pendidik Mata Pelajaran.

Pendidikan paling rendah lulusan S1-PLB (Pendidikan Luar Biasa) atau S1 Pendidikan Non PLB yang sesuai dengan Mata Pelajaran yang diampu dan memiliki keterampilan khusus.

3) Sekolah Dasar (SD)

a) Guru Kelas

Pendidikan paling rendah lulusan S1-PGSD (Pendidikan Guru Sekolah Dasar).

b) Pendidik Mata Pelajaran

Pendidikan paling rendah lulusan Strata Satu (S1) Pendidikan atau sederajat yang sesuai (linier) dengan bidang ajarnya.

4) Pendidik Sekolah Menengah Pertama (SMP) dengan Pendidikan paling rendah lulusan Strata Satu (S1) Pendidikan atau sederajat yang sesuai (linier) dengan bidang ajarnya;

5) Pendidik Sekolah Menengah Atas (SMA) dengan Pendidikan paling rendah lulusan Strata Satu (S1) Pendidikan atau sederajat yang sesuai (linier) dengan bidang ajarnya;

6) Sekolah Menengah Kejuruan (SMK)

a) Pendidik Mata Pelajaran Umum.

Pendidikan paling rendah lulusan Strata Satu (S1) Pendidikan atau sederajat yang sesuai (linier) dengan bidang ajarnya.

b) Pendidik Mata Pelajaran Produktif.

Pendidik selain mata pelajaran pada poin 1 (satu) dengan Pendidikan paling rendah lulusan Strata Satu (S1) atau sederajat yang sesuai (linier) dengan bidang ajarnya. Khusus konsentrasi keahlian Nautika Kapal Niaga dan Teknika Kapal Niaga memiliki sertifikat keahlian.

7) Pendidik Paket A, Paket B dan Paket C dengan Pendidikan paling rendah lulusan Strata Satu (S1) atau sederajat yang sesuai (linier) dengan bidang ajarnya.

8)Pelamar yang memiliki Sertifikat Pendidik untuk formasi jabatan yang dipilih mendapat nilai tambah.

9) Ijazah pelamar diperoleh dari program studi yang terakreditasi.

10) Pelamar yang berasal dari perguruan tinggi yang telah tutup, agar dapat dibuktikan dengan surat keterangan Lembaga Layanan Pendidikan Tinggi (LLDikti) atau Koordinatorat Perguruan Tinggi Keagamaan Islam Swasta (KOPERTAIS) di wilayah pendidikan terkait;

11) Ijazah pelamar terdata dalam Pangkalan Data Pendidikan Tinggi (PDDIKTI) yang dapat diakses melalui laman https://pddikti.kemdiktisaintek.go.id. Bagi pelamar yang tidak terdata dalam PDDIKTI, agar dapat dibuktikan dengan surat keterangan dari kampus terkait;

Dheefta Suuqa Bakaaraha iyo Kobcinta Dhaqaale ee Dalka.

Maqaalkaan  rubuc qarni (25) jirka ah waxa uu uu ahaa qayb yar oo ka mid ah deraasad sahan ah oo baaxad leh oo socotay 2001- 2002 cinwaankeeduna ahaa Mogadishu Economic  Survey taas oo loogu gol lahaa sida uu u shaqeeyo dhaqaalaha caasimadda xilligaas oo dalku burbur ku jiray. Qaybtaan oo deraasaddeenna ka mid ahayd waxaan ugu kuurgalaynay Suuqa Bakaaraha oo burburka ka dib dalka iyo dadka u ahaa xarun dhaqaale  iyo mid maaliyadeed oo ay bulshada Soomaaliyeed dheefsadeen.

Suuqaan waxaa la asaasay sanadkii 1972kii, xilliga ay deraasaddu socotay waxa uu ka koobnaa 46 qaybood oo ganacsi mid weliba lahayd guddi maamula, qaybahaas waxaa ka mid ahaa Suuqa Daawada, Suuqa Shidaalka, Suuqa isku beddelka Lacagaha Qalaad, Suuqa Cuntada, Suuqa Dharka, Suuqa Dahabka, Suuqa Caanaha, Suuqa Dikumintiyada aan sharciga ahayn ee Cabdalla Shiddeeye iyo kuwo kale.

Jiritaanka suuqaan iyo shaqayntiisaba waxaa suurageliyey nabadgelyada kooban ee ka jirtay deegaanka uu ku yaallo iyo burburkii ku yimid suuqyada Xamar weyne, Siinaay, Madiina iyo suuqyo kale, badeecooyinka Suuqa Bakaaraha laga raro waxay si joogto ah u gaarayeen dalalka Kenya iyo Itoobiya, ganacsatada Soomaaliyeed wuxuu ganacsigoodu ku xirnaa dalalka Imaaraatka Carabta, Bakistaan, Hindiya, Indooniisiya iyo Tailand iyagoo soo marsiisanayey Dekaddii Macmalka ee Ceel Macaan ee dhow Caasimadda.

Suuqu waxa uu soo jiitay maalgelinno culus oo ay ku sameeyeen ganacsatada Soomaaliyeed oo isugu jira dal joog iyo dibad ku nool. Suuqa Bakaaruhu waxa uu buuxiyey kaalintii Bankiga Ganacsiga isaga oo qabanayey shaqadii Bankiyada Ganacsiga sida keydinta iyo bixinta lacagaha, xawaaladda lacagaha loo kala dirayo deegaannada kala duwan ee dalka gudihiisa iyo dibaddiisa, sidoo kale ayuu suuqu u taagnaa kaalintii Bankiga Dhexe ee dhinaca dhowrista dhaqaalaha qaranka.

Xilliyada qaar Suuqa Bakaaruhu wuxuu dhibbane u  ahaa mowjado gilgilayey hawlaha ganacsi, kuwaas oo ay ka mid ahaayeen:

1- Suuqa oo ay maashayso lacago been abuur ah oo la soo daabacay taas oo khasabtay in lagu kalsoonaan waayo guud ahaan Shilinka Soomaaliga ugu dambayna keentay adeegsiga Dollarka Maraykanka.
2- Gubashada qaybo ka mid ah Suuqa mararka qaar oo sababta khasaare dhan Malaayiin Dollar.
3- Maqnaanshada kaalintii waxtar ee Rugta Ganacsiga, taas oo suuragelin lahayd nidaaminta iyo horumarinta ganacsiga.
4- Xirnaanshihii Dekadda iyo Garoonka Diyaaradaha Caalamiga ee Magaalada Muqdisho oo wiiqay dhaqdhaqaaqii ganacsi  ee xilligaas.
5- Dhismayaasha aan nidaamsanayn ee Suuqa oo saamayn xun ku lahaa isu socodka iyo muuqaalka wanaagsan ee suuqa.
6- Hakinta hawlihii Shirkadda Barakaat oo laga dhaxlay dhaqaalo beel.

Qabxiiwwan Ijoon ebbaa irraattii dubbatame:

Shekh Shariif (Imaama Masjidaa muhajirin): Hawaasni ijoollee 39 ebbiisisuu isaatiin carra-qabeessa ta’uu ibsuun, keessummoota hundaaf galata guddaa dhiyeessaniiru.

Markazni kun kanaan dura buqqatootaaf mana bultii fi bakka nyaataa ta'ee tajaajilaa waan tureef, gara fuulduraatti akka Markaza Hifzii fi Mana Barnoota idlee (Dhagaa Bu'uraa)  akka kaahamuu waamichaa godhanin jiruu hawaasni deggersa akka godhu waamichi dhiyaateera.

Shekh Abdul-Aziiz Shekh Aliyyi dura bu'an mana Maree dhimmoota islaamummaa kutaa magaala Boolee ebbifamtootaan fi hawaasan baga gammadan jedhan itti dabaluun kutaa boolee keessatti manneen barnootaa afur (kan madrasaa fi idlee walitti makate) Akka ijaaramuu hawaasa dhaamsa dabarsanijiruu.

Keessummoonii kabajaa Majliisa oromiyaa sheikh Muhammednur Ahmed akkasumas Dr.MuhammedHakim barreessaan ol'aanaa majliisa oromiyaa  fi dura bu'an Majliisa Magaala Adaama shekh Muhammud Huseen ergaa baga gammadani ebbifamtootaan ergaa jedhaanii hawaasnii diinii isaarraattii Akka jabaatu akkasumas waan hundaanuu hawaasa muslimàa cinaa dhaaban jedhaniruu.

Here are some facts about The Somali in the US.  READ.....Data from 2024–2025 indicates that the Somali immigrant population in the United States, particularly in Minnesota, makes significant economic and workforce contributions, including an estimated $8 billion annual impact on the Minnesota economy. 
Key data points regarding the contributions of the Somali community (primarily in Minnesota, which hosts the largest population) include:
Economic Impact & Taxes: Somali Minnesotans generate over $500 million in household income and pay an estimated $67 million annually in state and local taxes.
Workforce Participation: With a labor force participation rate of roughly 70%, Somali immigrants are active in key industries, including transportation (trucking), healthcare (nursing), manufacturing, and food processing (e.g., 11% of animal food processing workers in certain areas).
Entrepreneurship: Somali immigrants have established thousands of small businesses, including retail, daycare centers, barber shops, and restaurants.
Cultural & Civic Integration: The community is highly established, with an estimated 83% to 95% of Somalis in Minnesota being U.S. citizens or lawful permanent residents.
Addressing Labor Needs: Somali workers are considered essential to Minnesota's workforce, particularly in filling roles that would otherwise face disruption if this labor pool were removed. 
Contextual Data (Challenges & Growth):
Poverty and Income: Despite high labor participation, some reports indicate that about 30% to 57% of Somali Minnesotans live in poverty, and they may have lower median incomes compared to other groups.
Remittances: The Somali diaspora in the U.S. plays a critical role in supporting the economy of Somalia through remittances, which contribute significantly to the country's GDP. 
Note: The largest concentration of Somalis in the U.S. is in the Minneapolis-St. Paul area, with significant populations also in Ohio, Washington, and California.

Waxaa la sheegayaa in Yuweri Musaveni ku guulaystay doorashadii madaxwaynaha ee Uganda. Tan ayaa ka dhigan haddii uu dhammaysto shanta sanno ee soo socda in uu xilka joogay muddo afartan iyo shan sanno ah iyo markiisii toddobaad oo xiriir ah. Markii uu halganka ku jiray Museveni waxa uu ku doodday mushkilada Africa in ay tahay madaxda Africa oo aan doonayn in ay xilka iska wareejiyaan. 

Isaga qudhiisuna markii uu xilka yimi, waxa uu sheegay siddeed sanno oo kaliya in uu xilka joogayo. Mar kale na waxa uu sheegay in sannadka 2006-da in uu xilka isaga tagayo; mar kale na waxa uu xusay in isaga oo jira 75 sanno aannu xilka joogayn. 

Waxa xiisaha leh waxa weeye Museveni waa 81 sanno jir. Waxa uu xukumaa mid kamid ah dalalka ugu da' da yar adduunka. 75% dadka reer Uganda waxa ay ka yar yihiin da' da 30 sanno jir; 50% isla dadkaasi waxa ay ka sii yar yihiin 17 sanno jir. Taas macnaheedu waxa weeye saddex meelood oo afar dadka uu xukumo ma dhalan markii uu xilka qabtay. 

Wararku waxa ay sheegayaan in ninka dhallinyarada ah ee Bobi Wine gurigiisa ciidanku kala baxeen lana geeyey goob aan la garayn. Sidan oo kale waxa ay ku dhacday Dr Kizza Besigye oo muddo labaatan sanno ka badan oo uu ahaa mucaaradka ugu awoodda badan Uganda. 2001-dii, 2006-dii, 2011-kii iyo 2016-kii. Marar badan waxa uu magangalyo siyaasaddeed ku joogay South Africa, marar kale na jir dil halis ah iyo xabsi ayuu la kulmaayey, hadda na waxa uu xiran yahay muddo sannad ka badan.

Soomaaliya iyo dagaalka wakaalada (Proxy War)

W/Q: Idriss M. Sh Hamud. 

Hordhac

Soomaaliya maanta waxa ay si cad ugu dhex jirtaa dagaal wakiileed ( Proxy war) ay quwado goboleed iyo kuwo caalami ah ku loolamayaan, iyaga oo dhulka Soomaalidu degto u adeegsanaya meel ay ku fushadaan qaran . Faragelintani waxay halis toos ah ku taha xasiloonida dhulka Soomaalida.

Masar

Masar waxay Soomaaliya u aragtaa aalad ay Itoobiya ku cadaadin karto, gaar ahaan arrimaha Niilka, sidoo kalena waxay ka cabsi qabtaa saameynta Israa’iil ee Geeska Afrika. Waxaa ay xubin firfircoon ka yihiin khilaafka caalamiga ah ee Soomaalidu dhexgashay. . 

Sucuudiga

Sucuudigu imaan aha Isreal iyo saamaynteeda Geeska Africa wuxuu ku dareemayaa khatar jiritaan. Waxaa uu dareemaya joogis Isreal ku yeelato Berbera in ah ay khatar ku tahay amniga Badda Cas iyo Gacanka Cadmeed, taas oo ku riixaysa ka-qaybgalka proxy war-ka ay wadmada waaweyn ku galayaan gudaha Soomaalida.

Turkiga 

Turkiga waxaa ay Soomaalisa ka leeyihiin dano dhaqaale, siyaasadeed iyo saameyn goboleed, iyagoo qayb ka ah tartanka quwadaha. Waxaa ay xirmaysteen shidaalka Bada ee Soomaalida iyo sidoo kale aagag difaac iyo amni oo ay ka Heleen Soomaalida siiba koonfurta Soomaaliya. Taasi waxaa ay kusoo jiiday wadamo kale in ay loolanka kasoo qeyb galaan. Turkigu waa mid ka mid ah wadamada sida khaldan Soomaalida u isticmaala. 

Imaaraadka Carabta

Imaaraadku wuxuu diiradda saaraa dekedaha iyo istiraatiijiyadda Gacanka Cadmeed, taas oo Soomaaliya ka dhigaysa meel muhiim u ah qorshihiisa. 

Israa’iil

Israa’iil waxay leedahay dano amni oo la xiriira marin-biyoodka istiraatiijiga ah ee Gacanka Cadmeed. Aqoonsigeed Somaliland ayaa ka dhigay mid ka mid awoodaha hada usoo jeestay in ah ku loolamaan gudaha Soomaalida. 

Itoobiya

Itoobiya waxay raadinaysaa deked ay si buuxda u maamusho iyo gobollo u noqda buffer zone, sidoo kalena waxaa ay ku loolamaysa Masar oo uu kala dhexeeeyo khilaaf taariikhi ah, taasb oo ka dhigaysa in ay Itoobiya tahay xubin firfircoon oo ka mid ah wadamada proxy war-ka ka wada dhulka Soomaalida 

Kenya

Kenya waxay doonaysaa in koonfurta Soomaaliya siiba JL u noqoto aag difaac ah ( buffer zone) si ay u sugto amnigeeda qarankeeda. 

Jabuuti

Jabuuti waxay doonaysaa in dekedaha Soomaaliya aysan noqon kuwo awood ahaan la tartami kara dekadeeda, si ay u ilaaliso danaheeda dhaqaale. Djabouti waa mid ka mid ah dalalka ay Soomaalidu ka degi wayday.

Maraykanka

Maraykanku wuxuu xoogga saaraa la dagaallanka argagixisada iyo amniga Gacanka Cadmeed, balse firaaqa doorkiisu wuxuu sii huriyey proxy war-ka. Hada waxaa muuqata in uu xooga saarayo SL iyo PL. Joogitaankiisu waxaa ay ka dhigan tahay in uu ka mid yahay quwadaha ku loolamaya Soomaalida. 

Shiinaha

Shiinuhu wuxuu leeyahay dano dhaqaale iyo amni oo la xiriira ganacsiga iyo marin-biyoodka caalamiga ah dhulka Soonaalida Mara. Taas ayaa ka dhigaysa mid ka mid ah actors ka ku loolamaya Soomaalida.

UK iyo Midowga Yurub

UK iyo EU waxay ka walaacsan yihiin hoos u dhaca saamayntoodi, iyaga oo isu arka in ay khasaartay maalgelintii ay Soomaaliya mudo dheer ku samayn jireen. Gaar ahaan wadanka UK oo penholder ka ahaa Soomaalida marka la joogo UN ka 

Eritrea 

Erateria waxaa ay Soomaalida u aragtaa goob Itoobiya lagula dagaalami karo ama ugu yaraan cadaadis ahaan loo isticamaali karo.

Taiwan

Aqoonsigii Taiwan ee Somaliland waxaa uu soo jiiday in China ay iyada ka falcelinaysa Taiwan ay la saftay Muqdisho. Taas oo Soomaalida loosoo raray khilaafka labadaas wadan ka dhexeeya. 

Xuutiyiinta

Xuutiyiintu waxay Israa’iil iyo Sucuudiga u arkaan cadow jiritaankooda duulaan ku ah waxayna rumeysan yihiin in labadaas dal saldhigayo  ay ka sameystaab Soomaaliya iyo Somaliland ay uga dhigan tahay khatar amni taas oo ka dhigaysa oo dhulka Soomaalida bartilmaameed ay beegsadaan Xuusiyiintu.

Gunaanad

Soomaalidu hore ayay u soo martay proxy war noocaan oo kale ah kaas horseeday burburkii dowladdii dhexe. Si aan loogu laaban taariikhdii hore ee xanuunka badnayd, Soomaalidu waa in au fahmana in dhamaan wadamada ku dhex dirirayaa ay kaliya ka fakarayaan danahooda qaran ee istaraatiijiga ah ee aan dalna maslaxad Soomaaliyeed meesha u joogin. Umada Soomaalidu waa inay wada hadasho oo yeelato mowqif umadeed oo ay kaga badbaado saamaynta taban khilaafka caalamiga ah. Waxaa kale oo weecin  kara ama yarayn kara saameynta taban ee khilaafka an caalamiga ah in Maraykankana uu qaato doorkiisa hogaamineed si loo xakameeyo dagaalka wakiileedka ka socda Soomaaliya.

Wadamada ka qayb galay—Sacuudiga, Jabuuti, Turkiga, iyo Masar—mid walba wuxuu lahaa ujeeddooyin gaar ah oo istaraatiijiyadeed, kuwaas oo isugu yimid danaha guud ee ah ilaalinta midnimada Soomaaliya iyo ka hortagga faragelinta shisheeye.

Boqortooyada Sacuudi Carabiya: Isbeddelka Weyn iyo Xakameynta Imaaraadka

Joogitaanka Safiirka Sacuudiga, Axmed bin Maxamed Al-Mawlid, ee Laascaanood waa mid ka mid ah dhacdooyinka ugu miisaanka culus ee safarkan. Dhaqan ahaan, Sacuudiga wuxuu ahaan jiray mid ka gaabsada arrimaha gudaha ee Soomaaliya marka loo barbardhigo wadamada kale, balse tallaabadani waxay calaamad u tahay isbeddel weyn oo ku yimid siyaasadda Arrimaha Dibadda ee Riyaad ee ku aaddan Geeska Afrika
Xakameynta Saamaynta Imaaraadka Carabta (UAE)

Imaaraadka ayaa saldhigyo iyo dekedo istaraatiijiyadeed ku leh magaalooyinka Berbera iyo Boosaaso, wuxuuna xiriir dhow la leeyahay maamulka Somaliland. Sacuudigu wuxuu u arkaa tallaabooyinka Imaaraadka, gaar ahaan taageerada uu siinayo kooxaha gooni-goosadka ah ee Yemen (STC) iyo Somaliland, inay yihiin "khad cas" oo khatar ku ah amniga qaranka ee Boqortooyada iyo guud ahaan amniga Badda Cas.   

Burburkii heshiisyadii difaaca iyo dekedaha ee u dhexeeyay Soomaaliya iyo Imaaraadka  wuxuu fursad dahabi ah u siiyay Sacuudiga inuu buuxiyo booskaas, isagoo adeegsanaya awooddiisa dhaqaale iyo mid diimeed si uu u xoojiyo dowladda dhexe ee Muqdisho. Hada waxa dhawaan macquul ah in Map cusub oo Geeska Africa quseeya la maqlo, waxa socda ilaa 3 aragtiyood, oo la rabo in la tijaabiyo ta ugu fudud.

1. Waa in Canfarta Jabuti laga jaro oo Ethiopia la raadiyo si halka saamayn ugu yeelato Baabul Mandabka, Soomaalida Jabuti la so raaciyi S.land, sidoo kale , shidaalka Killika 5aad iyo dhul badan Ethiopia arinka lagaga badasho oo la so raaciyi S.land, Waayo lama ogola awood kala duwan oo dhulka Soomaalida saameeya, hal awood baa la qorshaynaya in ay gacanta kuwada dhigto, madaama sharcigij caalamiga aha dumay.

2. In Canfarta Ethiopia Iyo Tigre la raaciyo Erteria Lana dhiso Erteria wayn, lkn ka hor laga saaro Afwerki, khadka halka bada cas aan lo ogolaanayn awoodo kala duwan oo fadhiya, tan waxay iman Haday Ethiopia la jaanqaadi karo waydi siyaasada cusub.

3. In Canfarta Erteria la so raaciyo Ethiopia,Ethiopia ay qabsato qayb dalka ah, marka danbena ay isku wada fidiso, tan waxay iman hadii Asmara ay is adkayso oo la arko in ay khatar ku tahay Mapka cusub. 

Hada dad kooban baa arka, Wayse iman waqti aan sii fogayn IA.

Soomaalida waxa laga yaaba in ay ku badbadaan S.land ay rabaan in dumiyaan oo baabiyaan. Xog la, aanta waa cadaw.

She arrived in American politics carrying a history most leaders never have to explain.
Ilhan Omar fled civil war in Somalia as a child and spent years in a refugee camp before
resettling in the United States. English was not her first language. Politics was not an
inheritance. Power was not designed with her in mind.
In 2018, she became one of the first Muslim women elected to the U.S. Congress. The victory
was historic. The backlash was immediate.
Ilhan did not just represent a district. She disrupted an image. A Black woman. A Muslim. A
refugee. Speaking plainly about foreign policy, Islamophobia, economic inequality, and U.S.
power abroad. She refused the softened language often demanded from women and minorities
entering elite institutions.
The response was predictable.
Her words were dissected beyond context. Her loyalty questioned. Her existence treated as
provocation. Criticism that would have been routine for others was framed as dangerous when it
came from her. Disagreement escalated into condemnation. Visibility became vulnerability.
She did not retreat.
Ilhan continued pushing conversations Congress preferred to avoid. Civilian casualties.
Lobbying influence. Surveillance. The gap between democratic ideals and lived reality. She
spoke with the clarity of someone who had seen what state failure looks like firsthand.
Her presence revealed a deeper truth. Representation is tolerated when it is quiet. It becomes
threatening when it is substantive.
Ilhan Omar did not enter politics to be symbolic. She entered to govern, question, and
challenge. The intensity of the reaction to her proves exactly why her voice matters.
Power often claims to value diversity.
What it struggles with is dissent that comes from it.
What does it say about a system when the mere presence of one woman feels destabilizing?

Dugsiyada Dadweynaha ee Columbia Heights ayaa sheegay in ciidamada ICE ay afar ka mid ah ardaydeeda ku xireen afar dhacdo oo kala duwan labadii toddobaad ee la soo dhaafay. Hal cunug waa wiil 5 jir ah oo dhigta dugsiyada hoose ee Columbia Heights waxaana loo isticmaalay "dabin" si xubnaha qoyska looga soo saaro guryahooda.

"Maxaad u xireysaa ilmo 5 jir ah? Ma ii sheegi kartid in ilmahan loo aqoonsan doono dambiile rabshado wata," Zena Stenvik, oo ah madaxa guud ee Iskuulada dadwaynaha Columbia Heights, ayaa u sheegtay wariyeyaasha Arbacadii.

Ciidamada ICE aya wiilka qabtay kadibna u sheegay inuu garaaco albaabka gurigooda, Aabihiis oo albaabka furay iyo wiilka yar ayay ciidamada ICE guriga ka kaxaysteen, waxayna u qaadeen xarun ICE ay ku leedahay Gobolka Texas.

Stenvik ayaa sheegtay in Liam uusan ahayn ardayga kaliya ee Columbia Heights la xiray Talaadadii. Sidoo kale Talaadadii, arday 17 jir ah oo dugsiga sare ah oo ku sii jeeday iskuulka ayaa gaari kaligiis lagu kaxeeyay, iyadoo aysan la socon waalid, "iyadoo ay jiraan Ciidamo hubaysan oo wejiga qarsaday," ayay tiri.

Prokosch, oo ah qareenka qoyska, ayaa sheegay inuu baarayo sidii loo gudbin lahaa codsi habeas corpus ah si Liam looga sii daayo xabsiga. Wuxuu sheegay in qoyska ay codsadeen magangalyo ka dib markii ay sameeyeen hab sharci ah.

By Abdi Ismail Abib (Ayanle).

Marka aad aad aragto khatarta iyo cabsida ay muujiyeen badi madaxdii khudbadaha ka jeedisay shirka Davos, si gaar ah khudbadaha ay jeediyeen madaxweynaha France Macron iyo ra’iisul wasaaraha Canada Carney oo ahaa khudbado calool ka hadal ahaa saadaalinna u ahaa isku riiqanka adduunka ka dhici doona sanadaha soo fool leh.

Sidookale marka aad dib u milicsato waxa uu Trump Venezuela ka sameeyay sidookalana uu damacsan yahay inuu Cuba iyo Greenland ka sameeyo iyo dagaalkii Bariga Dhexe ka socday ee Turkey iyo Israel oo aan aragno inuu gudaha Soomaaliya iyo Gacanka Cadmeed soo gaaray, waxaa kusoo baxaysa in markale adduunka ay khasab noqonayso in kala miirad ka dhaco, badi qarammadii qarnigii 19aad samaysmayna intooda awoodda yar inta dib loo burburiyo kadibna qaramo cusub ay samaysmaan qaarkoodna lagaba taqalluso oo la baabi’iyo!

Sidaas darteed hadallada xanafta leh qaarkoodna ayba jiritaankeenna halista ku yihiin ee uu Trump maalmahan Soomaalida iyo dawladdoodaba raatibbada uga dhigay maahan in loo arko hadal uu nin waalan iska yiri kadibna aan kasoo qaad lahayn, kolleey uma malaynayo meel ra’iisul wasaarihii Canada, hoggaamiyaha France iyo qaar badan oo madaxda dalalka awoodda dhexe leh ay welwel iyo cabsi ka muujiyeen inaan annagoo iska tabaryar wax ka qaban karno e.

Ugu yaraan si guud shacabka iyo dawladdaba waa inay falcelin ku aaddan dareenkooda muujiyaan. Dagaal iyo tuuryo hadda waxba nooma tarto ee xataa dawladda waanwaan ha isku daydo ayada oo kaashanaysa xulafadeeda caalamiga ah si gaar ah kuwa uu Trump saaxiibka dhow la yahay ee uu ugu horreeyo Maxamed Bin Salman, iyo kuwa uu xoogaa qaddarinta u hayo ee uu kamidka yahay ninka ugu tunka weyn xulafada dawladdeenna ee Ordogan inta aan annagoo iska hurudna korka nalooga imaan, aamusnaantaan iyo kor ka daawashadaan waa mid halis weyn noo horseedi karta ka Soomaali ahaan.

Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland waxa ay qaaday tallaabo wayn oo diblomaasiyadeed oo xoojinaysa dedaalka helitaanka aqoonsi caalami ah. Kulankii uu xalay Madaxwayne Cabdiraxmaan Cirro  magaaladda Davos kula yeeshay Madaxweynaha Israa’iil Mudane Isaac Herzog, Eric Trump iyo madaxda kale oo caalamka ka socota.

kulankani waxa uu muujinayaa in Qaddiyadda Somaliland gaadhay marxalad cusub oo ay dunidu si dhab ah u tixgalinayso.

Diblomaasiyad ahaan, shirka xalay waxa uu dunida u dirayaa fariin cad oo ah: Somaliland waa dal nabdoon, dimuqraadi ah, leh nidaam dawladnimo oo si buuxda u shaqaynaya oo ku dhisan bisayl siyaasadeed iyo bulsho midaysan.𝐒. waxa uu xoojinayaa in Somaliland si kalsooni leh uga qayb-geli karto shirarka caalamiga ah.

Waxa aan si gaar ah ugu mahadnaqayaa Dawladda iyo Shacabka Israa’iil go’aan-kii taariikhiga ahaa ee ay ku aqoonsadeen Somaliland iyo xidhiidh diblomaasiyadeedna ku abuureen. 
Shacabka Somaliland waxa an ugu baaqayaa qolqol-joog iyo qurba-joogba adkaynta isku-duubnida, wadajirka iyo midnimadeena: si aynu u xoojino sumcada dalkeenu caalamka ku leeyahay, una tusno dunidda in aynu nahay dal u qlma aqoonsi caalami ah.

Mudane Madaxwayne, waan ku mahadnaqaynaa dedaalka aad waddo, sidoo kale waxa aan kugu garab taaganahay tallaabo kasta oo aad ku xoojinayso qaranimada iyo madax banaanidda Jamhuuriyadda Somaliland.

Sababta aan u qoray qoraalkan
Waxa igu dhalisay in aan qoro qoraalkan markii aan arkay dhalinyaro Soomaaliyeed oo ku wareersan dagaallada lagu hayo ummadda Soomaaliyeed iyo sababaha ka dambeeya, gaar ahaan faragelinta dalal ay ka mid yihiin Kenya, Israa’iil iyo Maraykanka 🇺🇸.
Hormarka Ummadda Soomaaliyeed
1. Hormar Diimeed
Soomaalidu waxay xaqiijiyeen hormar diimeed oo ballaaran 20-kii sano ee u dambeeyay, iyagoo:
Gaadhay kaalmaha hore ee tartamada Qur’aanka Kariimka ah (Dubai ilaa USA 🇺🇸).
Ka dhisay masaajiddo, maraakiz iyo hay’ado Islaami ah dalal badan (Soomaaliya ilaa Koonfur Afrika 🇿🇦).
Soo islaamiyey kumannaan qof oo ku kala sugan daafaha caalamka.
Ilaashaday diintooda iyo dhaqankooda, inkasta oo la isku dayay in lagu shubo fikrado qaldan.
2. Hormar Dhaqaale
Dhanka dhaqaalaha, Soomaalidu waxay ku guuleysteen:
In ay dhisaan shirkado waaweyn oo hantida ugu badan leh.
In ay tartan la galaan ganacsato aan Afrikaan ahayn.
In ay ka dhex muuqdaan magaalooyinka ganacsiga adduunka, sida:
Nairobi
Doha
Dubai
Muqdisho
Minnesota
3. Hormar Siyaasadeed
Soomaalidu waxay si muuqata uga dhex muuqdeen siyaasadda caalamka, gaar ahaan dalalkan:
Kenya
Itoobiya
Jabuuti
Maraykanka
Kanada
Sweden
Soomaaliya
Iyo dalal kale oo badan
Dagaallada iyo Cadaadiska Lagu Hayo Soomaalida
Waxaa si isdaba joog ah loo beegsaday hantida iyo ganacsiga Soomaalida, iyadoo la gubay suuqyo badan muddo kooban gudaheed (qiyaastii 3 sano), kuwaas oo ay ka mid yihiin:
Hargeysa
Muqdisho
Jigjiga
Doolow
Dhadhaab
Garissa
Wajir
Iyo kuwo kale oo aan halkan lagu xusin.
Shaki iigama jiro in gubitaanka suuqyadan ay ka dambeyeen gacan shisheeye 🤔❗️
Gunaanad
Dhammaan cadaadiskaas iyo weerarradaas inkasta oo la adeegsaday, haddana waa lagu guuldarreystay in la joojiyo kororka iyo hormarka ay sameyneyso ummadda Soomaaliyeed.
Taasi awgeed, waxaa la bilaabay dagaal toos ah oo lagu qaado Soomaalida.

Goal setting, as you work on your thesis, helps to have some way of reminding yourself of where you are going and why you chose to go there. It is about managing the long and short term. You can use a goal setting process to help you to focus on both the immediate goal, the writing that you do now or soon, and the long-term goal, the thesis that you have to produce. Somehow, you have to develop commitment to both goals and deal with the potential tension between the two:

Having the long view is being both energised and relaxed; enthusiastic and patient. It’s knowing in the marrow of your bones this one paradoxical fact: Writing’s been around a long time and will probably continue at least as long, and yet it always happens in the here and now.

What does this mean? Holding two contrary views in our minds, throughout the project, from now until it ends? What is, for each writer, the ‘long view’? You have to form your own long view. Take a few minutes now to write (five minutes, in sentences) about the long view of your research.

Your goal may not be to ‘become a writer’, but the thesis writing process goes on for long enough that writing has to become a major part of your life:

Seeing things whole, having the long view, is the only way to live the writer’s life. It’s committing yourself to a concept of writing as an integral, ongoing part of your life, instead of just a series of external events.

We have to see our writing process both as a long-term process and as a ‘series of external events’. We have to keep one eye on ‘what is in it for us’ and the other on ‘what they want me to do’.

In addition, there is value not only in seeing your project as a whole, but also in imagining the text of the thesis as a whole. You also need to construct an image of your life as a whole with writing in it. You then have to find a way of putting that into practice. In other words, there is more to goal setting than simply listing a sequence of actions; there is more to monitoring than ticking a box as you complete each task.

The principle at work here is bringing definition to the thesis writing process. You create stages in the writing process; these stages are a construction. You can play the numbers game, setting very specific writing goals. You have responsibility for creating a series of writing milestones.

Somali Migrants in Europe 

This statistical image shows the distribution of the Somali-born population across Europe, illustrating the main destination countries and the geographic concentration of Somali communities.
Data based on Eurostat, year 2021.
The data clearly indicates that the United Kingdom hosts the largest Somali community in Europe, making it the primary hub of the Somali diaspora on the continent. This is closely followed by Sweden, which also has a very large Somali population, reflecting decades of humanitarian migration and strong asylum and family reunification policies.
Norway, Germany, and the Netherlands form a second tier of major host countries, each accommodating sizable Somali communities supported by established migrant networks and social integration frameworks. Finland and Italy also stand out, highlighting Northern and Southern Europe as important regions for Somali settlement.
Medium-sized Somali populations can be found in Belgium, Switzerland, Austria, Denmark, and France, while Malta and Ireland show notable figures relative to their population size, often linked to asylum flows and labor opportunities.
In contrast, Eastern Europe and the Baltic states record very small numbers, underlining that Somali migration to Europe remains highly concentrated in Northern and Western Europe, particularly in countries with long-standing refugee reception systems.
Overall, the data underscores a strong Northern European focus, with the United Kingdom and Scandinavia acting as the core centers of the Somali diaspora in Europe.

Stockholm, Sweden 30 January 2026: The General Secretary of the Federation of Somali Trade Unions - FESTU, Omar Faruk Osman held a working meeting with Comrade Johan Lindholm, President of the Swedish Trade Union Confederation (LO-Sweden), at the LO headquarters in Stockholm. The meeting reaffirmed the long-standing strategic partnership between LO-Sweden and FESTU, founded on solidarity and labour unions comradeship.

Discussions focused on reviewing key priorities, reinforcing cooperation, expanding opportunities and further deepening collaboration between the two trade union centers. The meeting reflected the continued commitment of both trade union centers to solidarity, partnership and sustained collaboration in advancing shared objectives.

Aragtidayda, haddii laga guurayo magaca Somaliland, waxaa Ila habboon in la qaato magacyadan:  (1) Republic of Macrobia, (2) Republic of Kush, ama Republic of Adal.  Maxaa yeelay, (1) Macrobia waa erey lagu tilmaansado dadkii Soomaalida ka hor ku noolaan jiray geyiga geeska Africa, kuwaasi oo la rumaysan yahay in ay Soomaalidu fir ku leedahay, waxaana lagu sheegaa erey kale oo la yidhaa “Proto-Somali”. (2) Kush waa awoowe ay ka soo isirmeen dadka Kushitigga ah, sida Soomaalida, Oromada, Canfarta, Sidaamada, Saahada, iwm. (3) Saqistan waa kelmad u taagan isku darka Samaroon “SA”, iyo Isaaq “Q”, kaddibna waxaa xagga danbe lagaga daray “Istaan”, iyo (4) Adal waa erey leh macne dawladeed, xaddaarad xadfan, taariikh asali ah, ogaal ummadeed, iyo Sooyaal Soomaalinimo, gaar ahaan dadka reer Somaliland waxay u tahay faan iyo wax ay kaga geddisan yihiin Soomaalida kale. Doodda ugu weyni waa in gobolka Awdal iyo magaalada faca weyn ee Seylac oo xuddun iyo tiir-dhexaad u ahaa Adal Empire ay maanta dad ahaan iyo dhul ahaanba ka tirsan yihiin Somaliland. 

Sidaa awgeed, waxaan si gaar ah u xulanayaa magaca REPUBLIC OF ADAL, oo ah magac meel dheer gaadhsiin kara qadiyadda dalnimo & aqoonsiga Somaliland, waxa uu leeyahay ridmo siyaasadeed oo ka dareen iyo dhugmo duwan dhammaan taariikhda siyaasiga ah ee Soomaalida, dadkeenna waxaa loogu yeedhi karaa magac jinsiyqdeed qaran oo ah gaar u ah, sida (1) Adaliyiinta ama (2) Adlaians, halkii la odhan lahaa Somalilanders ama Somalilandians, kaddibna Soomaalida oo dhammi ay kugula doodi lahayd waa magac danta guud ah oo la wada leeyahay.

Tim Walz is standing firm in his defense of Minnesota’s immigrant communities—particularly the state’s large Somali population—as national political rhetoric grows more heated. At a December fundraiser, Walz argued that the right response to fear and division is inclusion, not scapegoating, drawing a clear contrast with the language used by Donald Trump toward Somali refugees.

Minnesota is home to more than 100,000 Somalis, the largest Somali diaspora in the United States. Walz has repeatedly pointed to their contributions as teachers, business owners, and civic leaders as evidence that immigration enriches the state. While opponents warn that expanded immigration could strain public resources, Walz counters that empathy and opportunity make communities stronger.

With midterm elections on the horizon, his message has rallied supporters while further highlighting the sharp political divide over immigration and identity in America.

WAR-CUSUB…Isbeddelka Shuruudaha Deggaanka ee dadka Magangalyo-doonka Sweden.

Dawladda Sweden waxay si rasmi ah u soo afjaraysay nidaamkii hore ee u oggolaanayay dadka magangalyo-doonka ah inay degaan meeshii ay rabaan (sida guryaha ehelka). 

Qorshahan cusub wuxuu nuxurkiisu yahay:

1. Degitaanka Qasabka ah (Reception Centers)
Qof kasta oo codsada magangalyo waxaa lagu qasbi doonaa inuu dego Xarumaha Qaabbilaadda ee dawladda inta dacwadiisu socoto. Ma jiri doonto in qofku iskiis u doorto magaalo ama guri uu dego.

2. Xakamaynta iyo Dabagalka
 * Joogitaanka Xarunta: Magangalyo-doonku waa inuu ku sugnaadaa xarunta loo qoondeeyey si loola socdo dhaqdhaqaaqiisa.
 * Goynta Kaalmada: Haddii qofku diido inuu dego xaruntaas ama uu ka tago, wuxuu waayi doonaa dhammaan kaalmooyinka lacageed (Dagersättning) iyo xuquuqda kale ee caymiska.

3. Ujeeddada Dawladda
 * Xawaaraha Dacwadda: In dadka hal meel lagu hayo si ay u fududaato wareysiyada iyo go’aan ka gaarista kiisaska.

 * Dhoofinta (Deportation): Haddii qofka loo diido sharciga, dawladdu waxay rabtaa in qofkaas uu gacanta ugu jiro si fududna looga saaro dalka, halkii uu ku dhuuman lahaa magaalooyinka dhexdiisa.

 * Yaraynta Soo-jiidashada: In Sweden laga dhigo dal adag oo aan u fududayn qaxootiga sida hore, si loo yareeyo tirada dadka imaanaya.

4. Maxaa iska beddelay nidaamkii hore?
 * Hore: Waxaad degi jirtay guriga ehelkaaga (EBO), waxaadna heli jirtay lacagta maalinlaha ah.

 * Hadda: Haddii aad ehelkaaga la degto, dawladdu kaama bixinayso lacag, waxaana laga yaabaa inay saamayso kiiskaaga maadaama aad jabisay sharciga

Kooxda Dhul boobka Mogadishu. 

Wada Akhri Qoraalkan Isbaheysiga Burcadda Dhul boobka Adigaa yaabi doonee. 

Hadda waxa uu ku fiday, Dhulka Siligga ee Degmadda Dharkeeynley. Waxaa la isku Afgartay in la boobo 100 Boos, Dadkii deganayna si farsamaa looga xoogo. 

Heerarka

Qofka waxaa la leeyahay laba kala dooro. 

1. In aan ku siino 4000 Dollar oo aad ku guurto. 

2.in aad na siiso 20,000 Dollar, waxaadna keenee Documentigaagii Hore, Hortaada ayaa lagu gubaa. Waxaana aan ku siineynaa Document Cusub, Adiga oo aan tagin Xafiisyada Dowladda oo wakhti iyo Hantiyo kaaga bixi leheyd. 

Arrintaa waxaa Fulinayo Xafiis kooxeed gaar loo leeyahay oo ku yaal "Hotel Afrik". 

Haddii aad Dood ka qabto, lama aadayo Maxkamad, waxaa uu xafiiskani ku leeyahay, Annagga ayaa keeneyno Go'aan Maxkamadeed iyo Fulin isla socdo oo ah Ciidamo diyaar ah oo Burburinayo Gurigaaga, Kuwa Hordhaca ah ee Dadka handadayo waxa ay wataan Gaadiid Ciidan oo Taargo Numbarka laga mariyay wax u eg Carra madoow si aan loo aqoonsan Numbarka, kadibna marka ay noqdaan laga dhaqo Carrada. Qofkii Dood ka keenana waxaa loo diyaariyay Xabsi kooxdu kor ka maamusho oo lagu karaama dilayo. 

Haddii aad raadiso yaa ka dambeeyo?

 Waxa cad in ay ku Lug leeyihiin Nin iyo Naag Ceelasha Biyaha degan, in Koox Maamul iyo Xildhibaanna Gogol fadhi u yihiin.

Milkiilihii ku adkeeysto in uu warkooda diido, waxaa loo sheegaa in Naftiisu halis gali karto, Kooxdana ay ku jiraan Rag hore arintaa fulinteeda loogu yaqiin. 

Waxaa Shaki kaa galaa, Dowladda Hoose, Maxkamadaha iyo Police-ka Gobalku arintaan maka war qabaan. Mise waxaa jiro Laba Dowladood oo iska hoos shaqeynaa, Kooxda Dhul boobka iyo Xubno Dowladda ka mid ah oo kor ka ilaalinayaan Fal dambiyeedkaa. 

Kooxdani Dhulka ay Boobaan Horay ayey  ka sii iibinayaan. Weeyna iska tagayaan, waxa ayna isga dhax baxayaan Qofkii laga xoogay iyo kii ay ka sii iibiyeen si ay ugu dagaalmaan oo dhiig ugu daato

Maxaa Xal ah? 

A. Kuwa laga sii iibinaa in aynan iibsan, bacdamaa uu keenayo dhiig ku daato mustaqbalka, marka labadooda dulmane la isaga dhax baxo. 

B. In Dowladu ay soo fara galiso, oo haddii Sharci cusub la siinayo, in Dadka ay iyadu toos ugu sharciyeeyso milkiilihii horeba ay Dowladda hoose u siisay. Si ka madax banaan Shirakada Burcaddaa ee Xafiisyada ka sameeystay Hoteelada iyo kuwa kale oo badan oo  ku dhax Shaqeysto Xafiisyo kiraa iyo Guryo  guurguuro oo Dadka lagu dhaco. 

Arrintaan kuma dhamaaneeyso, Gudaha Dalka oo hore ayaa 6 Sano ka hor Mashruuc caalamiya oo loo wakiishay "World Bank" uu u diiwaan galiyay Habka Loo yaqaan- Land Grabbing, 

( Land grabbing- refers to the large-scale, often unethical or illegal acquisition of land through purchase, power, lease, or governments, usually without the consent of local communities). Dhulalka la boobo iyada oo aan la tix galin Bulshada. 

Mashruucaa hore oo ku koobnaa Cirifyada Magaaladu ay ku fideeysay Magaaldu wakhtigaa. Kaa oo warbixin dheer oo laga diyaariyay aan hore u akhriyay. 
Laakin, hadda waxaa muuqdo in Caalamku uu si gaar ah ula socdo Dhul boobka Gudaha Magaalada lana diiwaan galinayo  kuwa wax boobay iyo kuwa laga boobay, si Mustaqbalka shuruud looga dhigo Dowladdu in ay wax ka qabato  kuwii falalkaa geeystay ama ku Lugta lahaa haddii kale wada shaqeynta ay wax u dhimi doonto, ilaa laga helo dowlad diyaar u ah in ay arimahaa dib u eegto, xuquuqdiina u soo celiso dhibanayaasha, kuwa ku lug yeeshana lala socdo Hantidooda Dibadda, Safaradooda iyo Xilalakooda Gudaha Dalka. 

Burcaddu waxa ay Sababatay: Masaakiin Hooy la'aan ah oo Geedaha hoos jiifo, Agoon inkaartamee, Dadkii iyo Dowladii oo kala fogaaday, Qooys ladnaa oo qaxooti ku ah Guryo qaraabo ama Guryo ayna iska bixi karin kiradooda, Odayaal wixii ay noloshooda tacbayeen ku dhisay hal Guri si ay ugu noolaadaan marka ay Howl gab noqdaan, dhacdadaan kadibna odayaashii Dhiig kar ayaa ku dhacay markii Dhulka laga boobay, Qaar ayaa u dhintay Dhiig karkii, qaar kale ay u dhul dhacay oo Sariirta saaran, Qaar ayaa Maankoodii - Ogaalkoodii hoos u dhacay, Qaar ayaa ku dhintay iyaga oo difaacaa Xaq ay lahaayeen oo Dowladu hore u siisay oo ayna isla Dowladii iyada oo aan u baahan ay Dad kale oo Burcad ah siisay, Shacabkii oo gaaray heer ay is barbar dhigaan Dowlad iyo Dowlad la'aan iyo Qaar ka quustay Cadaaladda Qiyaamaha ka hor. 

Reer Dharkeeynley dhibaa heeysto, waxaa ku yimid Wareegii Dhul Boobka. 

FG: la soco Qeybaha Dambe. 

FG :wixii ka khaldan ka sax, wixii ka dhimanna ku dar.

#Centrafrique: Suspension des activités de la CEMAC :  Quelles conséquences économiques pour le secteur privé et l’intégration régionale ?

Une note circulaire, largement relayée sur les réseaux sociaux, fait état de la suspension des activités et des missions de la Commission de la CEMAC, décidée par son Président, au motif d’un faible niveau de trésorerie disponible.
Cette décision, aussi surprenante que brutale, soulève de sérieuses interrogations économiques, institutionnelles, notamment quant à la capacité de la Commission à anticiper et projeter l’avenir d’un espace communautaire de six (6) États ( Guinée équatotiale, Rép. centrafricaine, Congo, Cameroun,  Chad, Gabon) , regroupant presque 70 millions d’habitants.

Une décision lourde de symboles et de conséquences

Il est permis de s’interroger sur les conditions dans lesquelles une telle décision a été prise.
A-t-elle fait l’objet d’une concertation avec les Chefs d’État et de Gouvernement de la CEMAC, héritière de l’UDEAC ?
Rien, à ce stade, ne permet de l’affirmer clairement.

Or, la suspension des activités d’une institution communautaire centrale envoie un signal négatif aux acteurs économiques, aux partenaires techniques et financiers, mais surtout au secteur privé, qui a besoin de visibilité, de stabilité et de cohérence régionale pour investir.

La question centrale du financement de la CEMAC

Cette situation relance inévitablement le débat sur le mode de financement de la CEMAC, en particulier sur la Taxe Communautaire d’Intégration (TCI).

*Comment cette taxe est-elle collectée ?
*Quelle est son efficacité réelle ?
*Quelles réformes ont été engagées pour en sécuriser la perception et la gestion ?

Sous la présidence de M. Baltasar ENGONGA, quelles mesures concrètes ont été initiées pour prévenir une telle crise de trésorerie ?
Ces interrogations méritent des réponses claires et publiques.

CEEAC-CEMAC: Une fusion toujours en attente

Autre sujet majeur: Le dossier de fusion entre la CEEAC et la CEMAC, régulièrement présenté comme une réforme structurante et salvatrice, mais qui tarde à se concrétiser.

Pourquoi cette fusion n’avance-t-elle pas ?
Quels sont les blocages réels ?
Pourquoi ne pas redoubler d’efforts pour bâtir une architecture institutionnelle régionale plus cohérente, plus efficace et moins coûteuse ?
À l’heure des contraintes budgétaires, la rationalisation institutionnelle n’est plus une option, mais une nécessité.

Climat interne et gouvernance institutionnelle

Il ne peut être exclu que cette décision traduise également des tensions ou revendications internes au sein de la Commission.

Certains observateurs s’interrogent deja sur l’impact psychologique et managérial de la relocalisation du siège dans des bureaux statutaires, perçue par certains comme un facteur.
Pourtant, Bangui offre un cadre paisible et un coût de la vie relativement compatible avec les standards des fonctionnaires communautaires.
Là encore, une explication est indispensable.

Un risque réel pour l’intégration et le secteur privé

Sans la Commission de la CEMAC, comment assurer la coordination des nombreuses institutions communautaires ?
Comment garantir la continuité des politiques communes, des projets d’intégration, de facilitation des échanges et de libre circulation ?
Le risque est clair: Une désintégration progressive de l’espace communautaire.

Or, il faut le rappeler avec force :

*Pris isolément, aucun pays de la sous-région ne dispose d’une masse critique suffisante pour offrir un marché porteur au secteur privé.

*L’intégration régionale est le seul levier crédible de compétitivité, de croissance et de création de valeur.
Un appel à la responsabilité et à l’inversion du signal
Les peuples de la CEMAC méritent des explications.
Les investisseurs aussi.

Dans un contexte déjà marqué par des inquiétudes persistantes autour de la stabilité du FCFA XAF et des équilibres macroéconomiques, cette suspension alimente un climat de doute et de marasme.

Il est urgent que les décideurs communautaires travaillent à INVERSER LE SIGNAL envoyépar CETTE NOTE CURCULAIRE, à restaurer la confiance et à réaffirmer la centralité de l’intégration régionale.

Car l’intégration n’est pas un luxe:
elle est l’uniqque issue,
le principal levier,
et le véritable accélérateur du développement économique donc du bien-être de nos populations.

Observons.

Jean-Gilles Kanko
Fils de l’UDEAC devenue CEMAC
